advice.cold: 🧥 Very cold — wear a heavy coat or down jacket
advice.cool: 🧣 A bit chilly — bring a jacket
advice.mild: 👕 Comfortable — a light layer or long sleeves will do
advice.hot: ☀️ Hot — go with shorts and a tee
advice.snow: ❄️ Snow expected — watch for slippery roads and stay warm
advice.uv_extreme: 🧴 Extreme UV — sunscreen is a must

panel.title: LifeKit
panel.subtitle: Manage base settings and saved locations while keeping weather, route, nearby search, and other tools available.

panel.locations.empty.title: No saved locations

panel.add.title: Add location
panel.add.tip: Adding a location performs city geocoding, so network access is required.
panel.store.disabled: Plugin storage is disabled. Saved locations will be empty and new locations cannot be saved.
panel.fields.defaultCityHelp: Leave empty to prefer saved default location, IP lookup, or system timezone.
